# Project Management Plan

## Purpose
Define how the project will be executed, monitored, controlled, and closed, including the
subsidiary plans, governance model, and baselines that guide delivery.

## Audience
Project Manager, PMO, Sponsors, Delivery Leads, Functional Managers.

## Inputs
- Project charter (`docs/methodology/waterfall/templates/project-charter.md`).
- Subsidiary management plans listed below.
- Organizational policies, standards, and governance requirements.

## Document Control Information
| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Document title | Project Management Plan |
| Project name |  |
| Document version |  |
| Prepared by |  |
| Preparation date |  |
| Last updated by |  |
| Last revision date |  |

## Document Purpose
Provide an integrated plan that defines the delivery approach, baselines, governance, and
controls for managing the project throughout its lifecycle.

## Template Table of Contents
1. Executive Summary
2. Project Overview
3. Governance & Stakeholder Alignment
4. Scope Management Plan (link)
5. Schedule Management Plan (link)
6. Cost Management Plan (link)
7. Quality Management Plan (link)
8. Resource Management Plan (link)
9. Communications Management Plan (link)
10. Risk Management Plan (link)
11. Procurement Management Plan (link)
12. Stakeholder Engagement Plan (link)
13. Change Management Plan (link)
14. Project Baselines
15. Approval

## 1. Executive Summary
Summarize objectives, constraints, success metrics, and the overall delivery approach.

## 2. Project Overview
### 2.1 Project Objectives
List 3-5 SMART objectives that define success.

### 2.2 Major Deliverables
List the major outputs the project will deliver.

### 2.3 Success Criteria
Define measurable acceptance criteria and outcomes.

### 2.4 Assumptions & Constraints
List the critical assumptions and constraints that affect delivery.

## 3. Governance & Stakeholder Alignment
### 3.1 Governance Model
Describe decision rights, escalation paths, and governance cadence.

### 3.2 Key Roles & Responsibilities
| Role | Name | Responsibilities |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Sponsor |  |  |
| Project Manager |  |  |
| PMO Lead |  |  |
| Change Control Board |  |  |

### 3.3 Stakeholder Engagement Summary
Describe stakeholder groups, influence, and engagement strategy.

## 5. Scope Management (Summary)
### 5.1 Scope Definition
Describe the project scope, inclusions, and exclusions.

### 5.2 Scope Verification
Define acceptance criteria and the verification process.

### 5.3 Scope Control
Summarize how changes to scope are requested, assessed, and approved.

## 6. Schedule Management (Summary)
### 6.1 Schedule Development Approach
Describe tools, assumptions, and methods used to build the schedule.

### 6.2 Milestone Summary
| Milestone | Target Date | Owner | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

### 6.3 Schedule Control
Define monitoring cadence, variance thresholds, and recovery actions.

## 7. Cost Management (Summary)
### 7.1 Budget Summary
| Cost Category | Budget | Forecast | Variance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

### 7.2 Cost Control
Describe how costs are tracked, approved, and controlled.

## 8. Quality Management (Summary)
### 8.1 Quality Objectives
Define quality standards and requirements.

### 8.2 Quality Metrics
| Metric | Target | Measurement Method | Frequency |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 9. Resource Management (Summary)
### 9.1 Resource Plan
Summarize staffing strategy and key roles.

### 9.2 Capacity & Utilization
| Role | Planned Utilization | Actual Utilization | Variance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 10. Communications Management (Summary)
### 10.1 Communication Matrix
| Information | Sender | Audience | Frequency | Method |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## 11. Risk Management (Summary)
### 11.1 Top Risks
| Risk | Probability | Impact | Response Strategy | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## 12. Procurement Management (Summary)
### 12.1 Procurement Items
| Item/Service | Procurement Method | Contract Type | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 13. Stakeholder Engagement (Summary)
Describe how stakeholder engagement will be monitored and adjusted.

## 14. Change Management (Summary)
Summarize the change control process, decision authority, and documentation.

## 15. Project Baselines
### 15.1 Scope Baseline
Reference the approved scope baseline and version.

### 15.2 Schedule Baseline
Reference the approved schedule baseline and version.

### 15.3 Cost Baseline
Reference the approved cost baseline and version.

### 15.4 Performance Measurement Baseline
Define how integrated scope, schedule, and cost baselines are used for performance measurement.

## 16. Approval
By signing below, the approvers acknowledge that they have reviewed the Project Management Plan.

| Approver | Role | Decision | Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] All subsidiary plans completed and linked.
- [ ] Baselines and change control procedures approved.
- [ ] Governance cadence documented.
- [ ] Success criteria and acceptance conditions defined.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Project management plan references all required subsidiary plans.
- Approvals captured from sponsors and governance leads.
- Baselines and control thresholds documented.
